name: Broccoli Mushroom Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate broccoli stalks and cook in 1 inch boiling salted water for 3 to 5 minutes. Drain.
2. Arrange broccoli in a greased 9-inch square pan.
3. Melt 6 tablespoons butter and blend in flour, salt, and pepper. Cook and stir until smooth.
4. Remove from heat and stir in milk. Bring to boil and boil for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
5. Add cheese and remove from heat. Stir in the mushrooms sautéed in the remaining 1 tablespoon butter until tender, green pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
6. Pour sauce over broccoli. Sprinkle with additional shredded cheese (if desired) and paprika.
7. Bake at 350°F for 15 to 20 minutes.
